WESTERFIELD vs. USF [SFSC #CGC 03-417577|—- ORDER [Proposed] REGARDING MOTION FOR
JUDGMENT ON PLEADINGS
S:AClient\101 USFI015 Westerfield\SuperiorCourtPleadings\Cross Complaint\Motion for Judgment ACC\Order Proposed.doc -|-

 
1 The motion for judgment on the pleadings of Cross-Defendant Patricia Westerfield to
2 ||the First Amended Cross-Complaint filed by Cross-Complainant University of San Francisco
3 || (“the University”) was heard in Department 514 of the above entitled court on February 8, 2006,
4 || both parties appearing by counsel. Appearing for Plaintiff Patricia Westerfield was Larry Organ,
5 || Esq. and Kelly Armstrong, Esq. Appearing for the University was Michael J. Vartain, Esq.
6 Having considered all papers in support of and in opposition to the motion and having
7 || heard and considered oral argument, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED:
8 1. Plaintiff's motion as to the cause of action for fraud is denied.
9 2. Plaintiff's motion as to the cause of action for declaratory relief is denied.
10 3. Plaintiffs motion as to the cause of action for injunctive relief is denied.
11 4. Plaintiff's motion as to the cause of action for intentional tort (conversion) is
12 granted, with leave to amend by February 27, 2006.
13 IT IS SO ORDERED.
